description: Create a new ReqView project to serve as a standard template for the engineering team. Use Project ID 'STD' and Title 'Company Standard Template'. The project must include three documents: 'Stakeholder Needs' (ID: NEEDS), 'System Requirements' (ID: SRS), and 'Validation Procedures' (ID: TESTS). Configure a custom enumeration attribute in the SRS document with ID 'complexity', name 'Complexity', and values 'Low', 'Medium', and 'High'. Save the project as a local folder at /home/ga/Documents/ReqView/StandardTemplate.
